attributes.action: Unlimited tax-free childcare, for all parents in the UK.
attributes.additional_details: This will give working parents the ability to balance work and life, will ensure children are adequately looked after, will support parents to stay in work, and will support childcare businesses to thrive.
attributes.background: Allow unlimited tax free childcare for all parents in the UK. No maximum earnings cap, and for any child under 11.

rejection.details:
The following petition calls for a similar action: 

Scrap child benefit and introduce universal free childcare for every family
https://petition.parliament.uk/petitions/750837
